title: Cyan Cobwebs + Outline
description: Cyan Cobwebs + Outline, make clips look cleaner
body:
Cyan cobwebs have a crisp, minimal outline that stands out clearly in combat. The cool color keeps edges sharp and easy to read, giving PvP clips a smoother, more fluid and visually clean look overall.

🎯 Clear outline for better visibility
⚡ Smooth look in fast PvP fights
🎥 Cleaner clips for better viewing
❄️ Cool cyan tone that stands out naturally
🧼 Simple style for a polished feel
